sentences.sentence: The history of human civilisation is entwined with the history of the ways we have learned to manipulate water resources.
sentences.translation: 人类文明的历史与我们学习如何利用水资源的历史交织在一起。

structure.text: The history of human civilisation
is entwined with the history of the ways we have learned to manipulate water resources
we have learned to manipulate water resources

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: As towns gradually expanded, water was brought from increasingly remote sources, leading to sophisticated engineering efforts such as dams and aqueducts.
sentences.translation: 随着城镇逐渐扩大，人们从越来越遥远的来源引水，由此推动了大坝和渡槽等复杂工程。

structure.text: As towns gradually expanded
water
was brought from increasingly remote sources
leading to sophisticated engineering efforts such as dams and aqueducts

difficult_points: because/although/as引导状语从句，说明原因、让步或时间关系。
主句的主语和谓语表达核心结论，从句补充背景或条件。

sentences.sentence: At the height of the Roman Empire, nine major systems, with an innovative layout of pipes and well-built sewers, supplied the occupants of Rome with as much water per person as is provided in many parts of the industrial world today.
sentences.translation: 罗马帝国鼎盛时期，九套主要系统配有创新的管道布局和建造良好的下水道，为罗马居民供水，人均水量与如今工业化世界许多地区相当。

structure.text: nine major systems
supplied the occupants of Rome with as much water per person as is provided in many parts of the industrial world today
with an innovative layout of pipes and well-built sewers

difficult_points: 句中使用系动词或被动结构，需辨认主语与表语/动作承受者。
后置短语补充说明范围、地点或影响。

sentences.sentence: During the industrial revolution and population explosion of the 19th and 20th centuries, the demand for water rose dramatically.
sentences.translation: 19、20世纪的工业革命和人口爆炸使水需求急剧上升。

structure.text: the demand for water
rose dramatically
During the industrial revolution and population explosion of the 19th and 20th centuries

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Unprecedented construction of tens of thousands of monumental engineering projects designed to control floods, protect clean water supplies, and provide water for irrigation and hydropower brought great benefits to hundreds of millions of people.
sentences.translation: 为控制洪水、保护清洁水源并提供灌溉和水力发电而建造的数万项前所未有的宏大工程，让数亿人受益。

structure.text: Unprecedented construction of tens of thousands of monumental engineering projects designed to control floods, protect clean water supplies, and provide water for irrigation and hydropower
brought great benefits to hundreds of millions of people
designed to control floods, protect clean water supplies, and provide water for irrigation and hydropower

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Food production has kept pace with soaring populations mainly because of the expansion of artificial irrigation systems that make possible the growth of 40% of the world's food.
sentences.translation: 粮食产量之所以跟上人口激增，主要是因为人工灌溉系统扩张，使世界40%的粮食得以生产。

structure.text: Food production
has kept pace with soaring populations
mainly because of the expansion of artificial irrigation systems that make possible the growth of 40% of the world's food

difficult_points: because/although/as引导状语从句，说明原因、让步或时间关系。
主句的主语和谓语表达核心结论，从句补充背景或条件。

sentences.sentence: Nearly one fifth of all the electricity generated worldwide is produced by turbines spun by the power of falling water.
sentences.translation: 全球发电量中近五分之一来自落水驱动涡轮机产生的电力。

structure.text: Nearly one fifth of all the electricity generated worldwide
is produced by turbines spun by the power of falling water
spun by the power of falling water

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Yet there is a dark side to this picture: despite our progress, half of the world's population still suffers, with water services inferior to those available to the ancient Greeks and Romans.
sentences.translation: 然而这幅图景也有阴暗面：尽管我们取得进步，世界上一半人口仍在遭受水服务不足，其水平甚至不如古希腊和古罗马。

structure.text: half of the world's population
still suffers
despite our progress
with water services inferior to those available to the ancient Greeks and Romans

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: As the United Nations report on access to water reiterated in November 2001, more than one billion people lack access to clean drinking water; some two and a half billion do not have adequate sanitation services.
sentences.translation: 正如联合国2001年11月关于用水权的报告再次指出，超过十亿人无法获得清洁饮用水，约25亿人没有足够的卫生服务。

structure.text: more than one billion people
lack access to clean drinking water
some two and a half billion do not have adequate sanitation services

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Preventable water-related diseases kill an estimated 10,000 to 20,000 children every day, and the latest evidence suggests that we are falling behind in efforts to solve these problems.
sentences.translation: 可预防的水传播疾病每天导致约一万至两万名儿童死亡，最新证据表明我们在解决这些问题方面正在落后。

structure.text: Preventable water-related diseases
kill an estimated 10,000 to 20,000 children every day
the latest evidence suggests that we are falling behind in efforts to solve these problems

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。

sentences.sentence: The consequences of our water policies extend beyond jeopardising human health.
sentences.translation: 水政策的后果不仅危及人类健康。

structure.text: The consequences of our water policies
extend beyond jeopardising human health

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Tens of millions of people have been forced to move from their homes—often with little warning or compensation—to make way for the reservoirs behind dams.
sentences.translation: 数千万人被迫离开家园——常常几乎没有预警或补偿——为大坝后面的水库让路。

structure.text: Tens of millions of people
have been forced to move from their homes
to make way for the reservoirs behind dams

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: More than 20% of all freshwater fish species are now threatened or endangered because dams and water withdrawals have destroyed the free-flowing river ecosystems where they thrive.
sentences.translation: 超过20%的淡水鱼物种如今受到威胁或濒危，因为大坝和取水破坏了它们赖以生存的自由流动河流生态系统。

structure.text: More than 20% of all freshwater fish species
are now threatened or endangered
because dams and water withdrawals have destroyed the free-flowing river ecosystems where they thrive

difficult_points: because/although/as引导状语从句，说明原因、让步或时间关系。
主句的主语和谓语表达核心结论，从句补充背景或条件。

sentences.sentence: Certain irrigation practices degrade soil quality and reduce agricultural productivity.
sentences.translation: 某些灌溉做法会降低土壤质量和农业生产力。

structure.text: Certain irrigation practices
degrade soil quality and reduce agricultural productivity

difficult_points: 句子主干由明确的主语和谓语构成。
并列成分补充说明动作、对象或结果。

sentences.sentence: Groundwater aquifers* are being pumped down faster than they are naturally replenished in parts of India, China, the USA and elsewhere.
sentences.translation: 在印度、中国、美国及其他地区，地下水含水层抽取速度超过了自然补给速度。

structure.text: Groundwater aquifers
are being pumped down faster than they are naturally replenished
in parts of India, China, the USA and elsewhere

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。

sentences.sentence: And disputes over shared water resources have led to violence and continue to raise local, national and even international tensions.
sentences.translation: 对共享水资源的争端已经导致暴力，并继续加剧地方、国家乃至国际紧张局势。

structure.text: disputes over shared water resources
have led to violence and continue to raise local, national and even international tensions

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: At the outset of the new millennium, however, the way resource planners think about water is beginning to change.
sentences.translation: 然而在新千年之初，资源规划者思考水资源的方式开始改变。

structure.text: the way resource planners think about water
is beginning to change
At the outset of the new millennium, however

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: The focus is slowly shifting back to the provision of basic human and environmental needs as top priority—ensuring 'some for all,' instead of 'more for some'.
sentences.translation: 重点正慢慢转回把基本人类和环境需求作为最高优先事项——确保“人人有一些”，而不是“少数人有更多”。

structure.text: The focus
is slowly shifting back to the provision of basic human and environmental needs as top priority
ensuring 'some for all,' instead of 'more for some'

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Some water experts are now demanding that existing infrastructure be used in smarter ways rather than building new facilities, which is increasingly considered the option of last, not first, resort.
sentences.translation: 一些水资源专家如今要求以更聪明的方式利用现有基础设施，而不是建设新设施；后者越来越被视为最后而非首选方案。

structure.text: Some water experts
are now demanding that existing infrastructure be used in smarter ways rather than building new facilities
which is increasingly considered the option of last, not first, resort

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。

sentences.sentence: This shift in philosophy has not been universally accepted, and it comes with strong opposition from some established water organisations.
sentences.translation: 这种理念转变并未被普遍接受，并遭到一些既有水务组织的强烈反对。

structure.text: This shift in philosophy
has not been universally accepted
it comes with strong opposition from some established water organisations

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, it may be the only way to address successfully the pressing problems of providing everyone with clean water to drink, adequate water to grow food and a life free from preventable water-related illness.
sentences.translation: 不过，这可能是成功解决为每个人提供饮用清水、种粮所需水量以及免受可预防水病影响的生活等紧迫问题的唯一途径。

structure.text: it
may be the only way to address successfully the pressing problems
of providing everyone with clean water to drink, adequate water to grow food and a life free from preventable water-related illness

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Fortunately—and unexpectedly—the demand for water is not rising as rapidly as some predicted.
sentences.translation: 幸运且出人意料的是，对水的需求增长没有一些人预测的那么快。

structure.text: the demand for water
is not rising as rapidly as some predicted

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: As a result, the pressure to build new water infrastructures has diminished over the past two decades.
sentences.translation: 因此，过去二十年建设新水利基础设施的压力已经减小。

structure.text: the pressure to build new water infrastructures

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Although population, industrial output and economic productivity have continued to soar in developed nations, the rate at which people withdraw water from aquifers, rivers and lakes has slowed.
sentences.translation: 尽管发达国家人口、工业产出和经济生产率持续飙升，人们从含水层、河流和湖泊取水的速度却放缓了。

structure.text: the rate at which people withdraw water from aquifers, rivers and lakes
has slowed
Although population, industrial output and economic productivity have continued to soar in developed nations

主句的主语和谓语表达核心结论，从句补充背景或条件。

sentences.sentence: And in a few parts of the world, demand has actually fallen.
sentences.translation: 世界上少数地区的需求实际上还下降了。

has actually fallen

sentences.sentence: What explains this remarkable turn of events?

sentences.sentence: Two factors: people have figured out how to use water more efficiently, and communities are rethinking their priorities for water use.
sentences.translation: 两个因素：人们学会了更高效地用水，各个社区也在重新思考用水优先顺序。

structure.text: people
have figured out how to use water more efficiently
communities are rethinking their priorities for water use

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: Throughout the first three-quarters of the 20th century, the quantity of freshwater consumed per person doubled on average; in the USA, water withdrawals increased tenfold while the population quadrupled.
sentences.translation: 20世纪前四分之三，人均淡水消费量平均翻了一倍；在美国，取水量增加十倍，而人口增加四倍。

structure.text: the quantity of freshwater consumed per person
doubled on average
Throughout the first three-quarters of the 20th century
in the USA, water withdrawals increased tenfold while the population quadrupled

difficult_points: 句子主干由明确的主语和谓语构成。
并列成分补充说明动作、对象或结果。

sentences.sentence: But since 1980, the amount of water consumed per person has actually decreased, thanks to a range of new technologies that help to conserve water in homes and industry.
sentences.translation: 但自1980年以来，得益于一系列帮助家庭和工业节约用水的新技术，人均用水量实际上下降了。

structure.text: the amount of water consumed per person
has actually decreased
thanks to a range of new technologies that help to conserve water in homes and industry

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。

sentences.sentence: In 1965, for instance, Japan used approximately 13 million gallons* of water to produce $1 million of commercial output; by 1989 this had dropped to 3.5 million gallons (even accounting for inflation)—almost a quadrupling of water productivity.
sentences.translation: 例如，1965年日本生产100万美元商业产出约需1300万加仑水；到1989年，即使计入通胀，也降至350万加仑——水生产率几乎提高了四倍。

structure.text: Japan
used approximately 13 million gallons* of water to produce $1 million of commercial output
by 1989 this had dropped to 3.5 million gallons

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: In the USA, water withdrawals have fallen by more than 20% from their peak in 1980.
sentences.translation: 在美国，取水量从1980年的峰值下降了20%以上。

structure.text: water withdrawals
have fallen by more than 20% from their peak in 1980
In the USA

并列成分补充说明动作、对象或结果。

sentences.sentence: On the other hand, dams, aqueducts and other kinds of infrastructure will still have to be built, particularly in developing countries where basic human needs have not been met.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，仍然必须建设大坝、渡槽和其他基础设施，尤其是在基本人类需求尚未满足的发展中国家。

structure.text: dams, aqueducts and other kinds of infrastructure
will still have to be built

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。

sentences.sentence: But such projects must be built to higher specifications and with more accountability to local people and their environment than in the past.
sentences.translation: 但这些项目必须按比过去更高的标准建设，并对当地居民及环境承担更多责任。

structure.text: such projects
must be built to higher specifications and with more accountability to local people and their environment than in the past

difficult_points: 不定式或分词短语在句中表示目的、结果或伴随动作。
先确定主句主干，再将非谓语结构还原为逻辑关系。

sentences.sentence: And even in regions where new projects seem warranted, we must find ways to meet demands with fewer resources, respecting ecological criteria and to a smaller budget.
sentences.translation: 即使在新项目看似合理的地区，我们也必须设法用更少资源满足需求，尊重生态标准并缩减预算。

structure.text: we
must find ways to meet demands with fewer resources
respecting ecological criteria and to a smaller budget

difficult_points: that/which/where引导从句，修饰前面的名词或补充说明内容。
主句先给出核心判断，从句明确对象、范围或结果。
